name: Christmas Eve Mexican Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Pineapple Chunks, in Juice (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Substitute 8 ounces water chestnuts for jicama if desired. Drain and slice.
Use sliced radishes if pomegranate seeds not available.
1-Drain and reserve liquid from beets and pineapple.
2-Peel oranges and separate into sections. Place in bowl along with bananas, beets, pineapple and jicama.
3-Mix reserved juices, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons sugar and salt; pour over fruit. Let stand 10 minutes; drain.
4- Arrange fruit on shredded lettuce. Garnish with lime wedges, peanuts and pomegranate seeds. Mix anise seed and 1 tablespoon sugar; sprinkle over salad. Yield: about 8 servings.
